title: No More Void Deaths
description: Removes the risk of dying in the void
body:
# The threat of the void is no more
![Bouncing over the void](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99cdf216fc0808a1603e7b9b317299c8e64d1110.gif)

- Prevents players from taking void damage
- If an entity falls in the void, they will start to bounce in the direction they are facing
- Clouds appear underneath the mobs with each bounce
- Players bounce higher and higher each bounce, until they land on the ground, with NO fall damage
- Use /toggleplayervoidlaunch to toggle on and off whether or not players will bounce
